title: 埃及十字架之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\27-埃及十字架之谜-埃勒里奎因.txt
summary:
At 9:45, local prosecutor Isam arrives at Broadwood in a county vehicle accompanied by three police officers. While Officer Wainwright engages Isam in conversation as a diversion, Ellery Queen drives his Duesenberg to the Addley estate to meet Professor Yardley, and the two walk toward Broadwood. Wainwright informs Ellery that Stephen Megalos is currently on his yacht due to a groin injury and that Dr. Temple has been attending to him aboard the vessel, the *Helen*.

Isam, Vane, Yardley, and Ellery board a patrol boat to reach the yacht. Upon boarding the *Helen*, they encounter Captain Swift and enter the main cabin, where they find Megalos suffering from a hernia testis. Dr. Temple provides temporary pain relief before departing via motorboat.

Once the group is alone, the man previously identified as a policeman is revealed to be Andrew Jagg Tewell, a headmaster. Megalos and Jagg disclose that they are members of the Tveril clan from the Black Mountains. They explain that a generational blood feud exists between the Tverils and the Croscos family. Twenty years prior, Megalos, Jagg, and a man named Tomislav attempted to kill the Croscos father and uncles through a trap. The only survivors were a mother and her child, Vilga, who fled to Montenegro and Italy. Megalos explains they have been tracking the now-grown Vilga across Europe to protect themselves from his expected vengeance, noting that he had disappeared until his recent reappearance.
